cleavage agent: trypsin was used as it is highly efficient during in-gel digestion
fragmentation method: MS/MS spectra were acquired using higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: separated on a C18 reversed phase column using a gradient of 2 to 35% B in 180 min at a flow rate of 300 nl/min at 45°C. Mass spectra were acquired in data-dependent mode with a high resolution (60,000) Fourier transform MS survey scan followed by MS/MS of the most intense precursors with a cycle time of 3 s.
